message:
fix: prevent panic on malformed nonce and zeroize PBKDF2 key material

Bug 1: Nonce::from_slice panics if the nonce decoded from config.json
is not exactly 12 bytes. Validate with try_into before calling
from_slice in unwrap_key, returning an error instead of crashing.

Bug 2: The PBKDF2-derived key in html_export/encryption.rs was left
on the stack after use. Wrap it in zeroize::Zeroizing so it is
automatically cleared on drop, consistent with key_management.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
